name: vibenest-switcher-extension
description: Build/test/package scripts for the VibeNest Switcher Chrome extension. The extension itself is plain JS; this file exists only for tooling.

scripts.test: node --test lib/detector.test.mjs lib/config.test.mjs lib/adapters.test.mjs lib/autocorrect.test.mjs lib/replace.test.mjs lib/content.test.mjs lib/package.test.mjs lib/i18n.test.mjs lib/hangul.test.mjs
